name: cheshire-terminal
description: Cheshire Terminal — voice-controlled Solana terminal powered by $CLAWD. Agent hub, dual-rail forge (Robinhood Chain + Solana Metaplex), skills marketplace, MCP, and x402 settlement on cheshireterminal.ai.

services.name: dashboard
services.description: Main hub — agents, forge, skills, terminal, x402 gateway

services.name: api
services.description: REST API — developer status, skills, auth, agent registry, Metaplex agents

services.name: gateway
services.description: Developer API gateway portal — scoped ct_sk_ keys, OpenAPI, catalog, llms.txt (/api/gateway/* alias)

services.name: gateway-api
services.description: Branded gateway API prefix — status, openapi.json, catalog, skills (same keys as /api/*)

services.name: forge
services.description: Dual-rail identity forge (Robinhood ERC-8004 + Solana Metaplex)

services.name: agent-registry
services.description: Public agent registry UI (proxy to registry.cheshireterminal.ai)

services.name: x402
services.description: x402 payment gateway — SPL USDC + $CLAWD settlement

services.name: websocket
services.description: Real-time streaming for on-chain events and agent communication
